heading: Limitation on taxpayer’s basis or inventory cost in property imported from related persons
label: 1059A Limitation on taxpayer’s basis or inventory cost in property imported from related persons
notes: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 99–514, title XII, § 1248(c)100 Stat. 2584Oct. 22, 1986“The amendments made by this section [enacting this section] shall apply to transactions entered into after .”March 18, 1986
amendments: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 99–514, title XII, § 1248(c)100 Stat. 2584Oct. 22, 1986“The amendments made by this section [enacting this section] shall apply to transactions entered into after .”March 18, 1986

children.text: which are taken into account in computing the basis or inventory cost of such property by the purchaser, and
which are also taken into account in computing the customs value of such property,

children.heading: Customs value
children.label: 1 Customs value
children.text: The term “customs value” means the value taken into account for purposes of determining the amount of any customs duties or any other duties which may be imposed on the importation of any property.

children.heading: Import
children.label: 2 Import
children.text: Except as provided in regulations, the term “import” means the entering, or withdrawal from warehouse, for consumption.
